message:
Fix multiple UX issues

- Thumbnail caching: Always capture fresh screenshots for visible windows
- Remove dismiss button from sidebar - keyboard only navigation
- Make preview window resizable, repositionable, and persist geometry
- Add local event monitor to catch hotkey when app has focus
- Repeated hotkey press now closes Winby (toggle behavior)
- Space in search no longer triggers filtering (trimmed)
- Cmd+Enter fullscreens the selected window
